name: python3-sqlite-migrate
title: python3-sqlite-migrate
description:
Python library for SQLite migrations
Python library to operate changes on SQLite database, based on
migration files.

When validating lab setup, run `python3-sqlite-migrate --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
